name: techshield-ai
description: TechShield AI — Enterprise Chrome Extension + SaaS Platform

scripts.build: npm run build:frontend && npm run build:extension
scripts.build:frontend: cd frontend && npm ci && npm run build
scripts.build:extension: cd extension && npm ci && npm run build
scripts.test: npm run test:unit && npm run test:integration
scripts.lint: npm run lint:frontend && npm run lint:extension
